## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue/feature area. Include relevant motivation and context.

- Fixes # (issue)
- Feature Area: [Models / Backend / Pipeline / Dashboard / Shared]

## 🛠️ Type of Change

Please mark options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code Refactoring / Chore
- [ ] Documentation Update

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] Automated Tests (e.g. `pytest backend/tests/`)
- [ ] Manual CLI smoke testing (e.g. run `orchestrator.py` or script)
- [ ] VLM Mocking Output Verification

**Test Configuration**:
* Python version:
* Ollama Model (if VLM):

## 🏁 Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings / syntax errors
- [ ] I have verified that all model outputs conform to the Pydantic `pipeline/schema.py` contract
